description: Stack-variety end-to-end evals for the post-fix iteration. Each case is a disposable sandbox with realistic manifests and planted README drifts. The baseline arm is the same natural-language task without skill access. Assertions below drive the grading step.

evals.prompt: I just cloned /tmp/eval-sandbox-node-fastify on a new laptop. Give claude rag steroids on it — I want the full browzer bootstrap end-to-end: init + index the workspace if missing, sync any stale docs, generate an architecture blueprint, map my installed claude skills to this codebase, tune the search-guard vocab if new libs warrant it, and commit what you produced.
planted_drifts: Jest suite claim vs vitest devDep
Express stack claim vs fastify import

evals.prompt: I just cloned /tmp/eval-sandbox-nextjs-app-router. Give claude rag steroids on it — full browzer bootstrap end-to-end: init + index, fix stale docs, blueprint, skill map, vocab tune, commit.
planted_drifts: Pages Router claim vs app/ dir present
Material UI claim vs tailwindcss dep
getServerSideProps claim vs async server components

evals.prompt: I just cloned /tmp/eval-sandbox-go-fiber. Give claude rag steroids on it — full browzer bootstrap end-to-end.
planted_drifts: Echo framework claim vs gofiber/fiber import

evals.prompt: I just cloned /tmp/eval-sandbox-python-rag. Give claude rag steroids on it — full browzer bootstrap end-to-end.
planted_drifts: Pinecone claim vs chromadb + qdrant-client deps

common_assertions: workspace_created: <sandbox>/.browzer/config.json exists and is valid JSON
blueprint_nine_sections: ARCHITECTURE_BLUEPRINT.md contains 9 '##' top-level sections matching the skill's spec
new_commit_exists: git log shows a new commit on top of the initial fixture commit
drifts_fixed: all planted drifts in README are resolved (no original drift strings remain)
